action: Add a GitHub Actions adapter that materializes a tree-SHA-bound continuity current-view manifest from the complete immutable repository snapshot.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-006 identified live recursive-tree execution and immutable manifest retention as the highest-priority unresolved continuity handoff.

memory_recovered: The continuity current view now has a committed execution path that binds canonical queue state and every enumerated append-only update to one immutable commit and recursive tree, with completeness denied when the tree is truncated or any enumerated document fails retrieval or parsing.

contradictions_resolved.apparent_conflict: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains a historical canonical snapshot while newer continuity items exist only as append-only queue updates.
contradictions_resolved.resolution: The adapter explicitly preserves canonical_snapshot and append_only_update as separate source layers and derives a current view without rewriting either source.
contradictions_resolved.remaining_unresolved: A successful workflow artifact has not yet been observed.

inferred: a successful artifact establishes discovery completeness for its named immutable tree snapshot
proposed: use the retained manifest as the continuity input for later cross-team state synthesis
superseded: curated update lists and deterministic reduction alone as sufficient completeness evidence

verification.runtime_execution: blocked in the local automation container by DNS resolution failure for github.com

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract decision history only. No raw private chat, health or pet-health information, credentials, identifying personal material, or unreviewed uploaded content was copied into the repository.
next_action: Observe or dispatch the Continuity Current View workflow, retain the generated artifact, and index its commit SHA, recursive tree SHA, enumerated path count, and completeness result as a new observed continuity record.
